bindings.title: Synthesis.md - People's Prize
bindings.excerpt: Synthesis - The People's Choice AwardHOW TO PLAYPHASE 1 - SUBMIT: Until Thursday, April 2nd you can submit a synthesis.md hackathon project to be considered as the People's Choice winner. Simply submit a tweet with your project's Github or Devfolio URL attached, then come and submit it here. PHASE 2 - VOTE: Once Phase 1 closes, voting runs for...
bindings.source_summary: Synthesis - The People's Choice AwardHOW TO PLAYPHASE 1 - SUBMIT: Until Thursday, April 2nd you can submit a synthesis.md hackathon project to be considered as the People's Choice winner. Simply submit a tweet with your project's Github or Devfolio URL attached, then come and submit it here. PHASE 2 - VOTE: Once Phase 1 closes, voting runs for 2 HOURS: 4:00PM GMT to 6:00PM GMT on April 2. Your project can be voted on by anyone, including yourself, to be the People's Choice winner.RESEARCH THE...
